question: What is the purpose of the parsley in the image? Select from the following options: (A) To add extra flavor to the potato salad. (B) To make the dish look more aesthetically pleasing. (C) To serve as an additional side dish. (D) To act as a base for the other ingredients.
gold_answer: To make the dish look more aesthetically pleasing
